entries.title: BOOKS OF SESSIONS 1 KINGS 18:29 on first-kings 18:29
entries.excerpt: [Elijah and the prophets of Baal] had agreed to fix a specific time and deadline [by saying], "We will stay until this hour, and he whose sacrifice is not accepted will die." Otherwise they might have said, "Today [our sacrifice] was not accepted, but it will be accepted tomorrow."
